dcc_name: Artificial Intelligence Ready and Exploratory Atlas for Diabetes Insights
dcc_description: The AI-READI project  (NIH Bridge2AI Salutogenesis Grand Challenge) seeks to create and share a flagship dataset of type 2 diabetes, optimized for future artificial intelligence/machine learning (AI/ML) analysis that could provide critical insights and especially shine light on the salutogenic pathways from diabetes to return to health.
